## Source: amazon-inspector (713fcab117c3d896c25c79498daded14d2b7d69baecb99c233703f421caaca26)
The package 4exepreds was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (bb41a27c9bb4b46f750f96b9c501e4a8420852d3ea76be5cb5cd40896972cb0c)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '4exepreds' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
